reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): The warm golden frame with cream/ivory interior reads as friendly, warm, and Hyrule-appropriate. The gold-brown-teal palette is charming and toy-diorama in spirit; not grim or scary. Emotional register is strong (~8/10 on this axis). Technical axis (40%): Hard pixel outlines are present on the golden frame border and appear grid-snapped. The frame itself uses 2-3 tone hard shading correctly. However, at high zoom the corner decorations collapse into a noisy red-brown-teal color cluster that lacks clean pixel-art legibility — individual elements (rope? gems? leaves?) are indistinguishable and the pixel placement reads as messy rather than deliberate. Small dark dashes near the interior bottom edge are also ambiguous (intentional detail or artifact). The Denzi reference confirms that panel borders in this category should have crisp, readable motifs even at 1x — the corners fall short of that bar. Weighted: emotional ~8, technical ~5.5, combined ~7.
